Bhindi Masala #shorts #bhindimasala #bhindirecipe #bhindicurry #indianfood #indianrecipe #food
description:
Ingredients: 
1. Okra – 300g
2. Oil for frying 
3. Salt as per your taste
4. Red chili powder- 1tsp 
5. Cooking oil – 2tbsp
6. Cumin seeds – ½ tsp 
7. Black Seeds (Kalonji) – 1/2tsp 
8. Onion – 1
9. Dry mango powder – 1tsp 
10. Red Chili powder – 1/2tsp 
11. Coriander powder -1tsp 
12. Cumin powder -1/2 tsp
13. Garam masala – 1/2tsp 
14. Turmeric -1/2 tsp 
15. Water -2-3tbsp
16. Tomatoes – 1

Cooking Steps: 
1. Fry okra 50% and then add chili powder and salt and keep aside.
2. Add black seeds & cumin seeds in hot oil and when the seeds crackle, add onion and fry till it changes color.
3. Now, add mango powder, red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala and turmeric powder to water to make paste
4. Add the paste and tomatoes puree into the fried onion at step 2 and fry well. 
5. Now, add fried okra int the gravy and cook them well. 
Ready to be served.

title: Street Food🌯@aalusheddo #food #foodie #foodvlog #minivlog #india #cooking #bangladesh #cricket
description:
In this video we will be comparing the most famous food items of two neighbouring countries of the Indian sub continent, India and Bangladesh. While India and Bangladesh are extremely famous for their rivalry in cricket, these two countries are also well known for their delicious street food that can be found at the corner of every street in these countries. India’s list of most popular street food items includes but is not limited to Kathi Rolls, Samosas, Vada Pavs and many more. Bangladesh is not behind with its own delicacies including but not limited to Puchka, kachhi biryani, bhelpuri and many more. Surprisingly both the dishes from both these countries were extremely flavourful and unique in their own way. We had a great time preparing and trying out these food items. Hope you guys enjoy the video !

description:
Welcome to our channel! In this video, we're sharing our mouthwatering recipe for Egg Curry. If you're a fan of eggs and crave a satisfying, flavorful meal, you've come to the right place! This easy-to-follow recipe will guide you through each step, from preparing the aromatic spices to creating a creamy and aromatic curry sauce.

Our Egg Curry is packed with rich flavors that blend harmoniously with the tender boiled eggs, creating a delightful dish that will impress your friends and family. Whether you're a seasoned cook or just starting out in the kitchen, this recipe is perfect for everyone! 

Join us as we take you on a culinary journey, showing you how to create this authentic and satisfying dish. The combination of fragrant spices like cumin, coriander, and turmeric, along with the creamy tomato base, will tantalize your taste buds.

Feel free to customize this Egg Curry recipe to suit your preferences. Add more heat with chili powder or make it milder by reducing the spice quantities. Serve it alongside fluffy rice, naan bread, or chapati for a complete and satisfying meal.

title: Don’t try this at home😳😱 Spiciest chilly and Machher Jhol in Siliguri, West Bengal 🔥🌶️ #ytshorts
description:
Aisa Machher Jhol Life Mein Nahi Khaya 🐟🦐🤤 | Siliguri Ep.2  @soumya.ghosh25 @tulimaitra @rohan.10dey 

Watch full episode on YouTube-Ashish Vidyarthi Actor Vlogs

Yeh Food nahi, Food-for-Soul hai kyuki.... Aaj karenge Siliguri mein Food Mukbang!
Come join us for a scrumptious lunch today! We are enjoying some very authentic delicious home-cooked food of Siliguri in North Bengal at my dear friend Soumyajit aka  @zerowattfilms  home. Agar aap accha aur Ghar ke khane ke shaukeen hain toh yakeen maniye aapko bada mazaa aane wala hai. 

Aapne teekhi mirchi toh khayi hogi lekin yaha gazab ka teekha mirch milta hai, kabhi North Bengal aayen toh try jarur kijiyega. 
A hearty meal of Chingri dipped in a tasty sauce followed by a unique flavour of fish that’s very light on the stomach and heart along with Jhol made of ‘Tok Pui Saag’ which is only found in North Bengal. Kuch beyhadh lazeez handi mutton ka luft uthayenge jiske flavour aur taste ko agar ek word mein describe karu toh bilkul “uncle” hai dost! Iss purey meal ki khaas baat hai uski saadgi aur swad. 

Gazab ka zone aur ussey bhi lajaawb khaana bole toh mamala ‘Zone’ mein hai. It is pure love and warmth that Soumyajit and I feel as we enjoy the wholesome meal lovingly being served and surrounded by family members. 

Dil se Shukriya karta hoon Soumyajit aur unke poorey Parivaar ka jinhone itna Pyaar aur Aadar diya.
I am touched by your selfless and generous love ❤️🙏🏾 
Soumyajit aur unke pyaare parivaar ko iss video ke jariye dher sara pyaar dijiye aur hum sab fir milenge Siliguri series ke agle episode mein.

Tab tak ke liye,
Alshukran Bandhu,
Alshukran Zindagi.

description:
Poor man burnt ends. I got the @meatergram keeping the temps on check on this chuck roast. Super easy to do with the right temperature on when to remove it from the heat. 
.
.
Instructions 
Slather chuck roast with mustard as a binder (optional) then add your favorite bbq rub. Insert @meatergram and put on grill at 250 degrees. Remove from heat at 165 and wrap in foil, do not cover the end of probe as it will not communicate with your phone. Put back on grill and remove at 195 internal temp, slice into cubes add to a oven safe dish and add unsalted butter 4 tbsp, your favorite bbq sauce and wrap with foil. Remove after one hour and check for tenderness, let rest for 10 min and enjoy.

3 tbsp Spring Onion choppings

description:
Have you tried Rasam like before⁉️

Madhampatti Thakkali Rasam

Recipe

Tomatoes - 2 nos (large sized)
Water 2 cups
Boil it for 10 mins
Let it cool down

Squeeze with your hands and remove the tomato skin
Add tamarind extract (a small sized tamarind soaked and extracted)
Turmeric powder - 1/2 tsp
Salt to taste
Bring it to boil

Meanwhile 
Pepper - 1 tsp
Cumin seeds - 1 tsp
Garlic - 5 cloves 
Red chilies - 2 nos
Pulse it couple of times

For tempering 
Oil - 2 tbsp
Mustard seeds - 1/2 tsp
Fenugreek seeds - 1-4 tsp
Dried chillies - 1 (broken)
Curry leaves 
Ground Rasam masala 
Hing - 1/4 tsp
Fry it for a min
Add it to the Rasam
Coriander leaves 
Once the Rasam starts to foam on the sides, turn off the heat

Enjoy the delicious Rasam with some Suda Suda Sadham 🤗

title: Butter Garlic Herb Rice – Aromatic & Flavorful One-Pot Meal | Super flavorful & buttery #food#foodie
description:
🍚🧄 Fluffy, Aromatic & Bursting with Flavors – Butter Garlic Herb Rice! 🧈🌿

This rich and fragrant rice dish is cooked with butter, garlic, and a medley of herbs for a simple yet irresistible meal. Perfect as a quick lunch, side dish, or meal prep option, this restaurant-style garlic rice pairs well with any curry, grilled meat, or roasted veggies!

🔥 Super flavorful & buttery
🌿 Loaded with aromatic herbs & garlic
🍚 Pairs perfectly with any meal!

Follow our easy recipe to make this delicious Butter Garlic Herb Rice at home!

Ingredients:
Basmati Rice / Seeraga Samba Rice: 1 cup (cooked)

Butter: 2 tablespoons

Garlic: 5 cloves, finely chopped

Mixed Herbs (Oregano, Basil, Thyme, Rosemary): 1 teaspoon

Black Pepper Powder: ½ teaspoon

Salt: To taste

Spring Onions / Coriander Leaves: For garnish

Chili Flakes (Optional): ½ teaspoon

Instructions:
1️⃣ Heat butter in a pan and add finely chopped garlic. Sauté until golden brown.
2️⃣ Add mixed herbs, black pepper, and chili flakes. Stir for a few seconds.
3️⃣ Toss in the cooked rice and mix gently until well coated.
4️⃣ Adjust salt if needed and stir for 2 minutes on low flame.
5️⃣ Garnish with fresh spring onions or coriander leaves.
6️⃣ Serve hot with your favorite side dish!

Serving Suggestions:
Best paired with grilled chicken, roasted vegetables, or creamy mushroom sauce.

Perfect as a side dish with butter chicken, paneer masala, or egg curry.

Enjoy as a light meal with a bowl of hot soup!

Welcome to ‪‪ @tamo__tyan ‬ ‬Channel!

On this channel, we showcase some of Japan’s best and most delicious sweets and foods!

【Cute Fish-Shaped Wagashi 🐟】

Wakaayu (Young Sweetfish) - 200 yen
This traditional Japanese sweet, shaped like a small fish, has been crafted by skilled artisans for generations. It’s a seasonal delicacy that beautifully captures the essence of summer in Japan. In some regions, it’s cherished as a summer festival favorite and makes a lovely gift or souvenir.

Our Wakaayu features a subtle hint of soy sauce in the dough, adding a savory aroma that pairs perfectly with its chewy, mochi-like texture. The combination of flavors and textures makes it truly irresistible!

You'll find a variety of other wagashi sweets at the shop—perfect for those with a sweet tooth! 😋

Baklava
description:
Ingredients:

- 1 /2 cup of water
- 1 tablespoon of yogurt
- 1/4 cup of vegetable oil
- 1 tablespoon of butter
- 1 packet of (10 g)baking powder 
- 1 tablespoon of grape vinegar (can also use apple vinegar)
- 1 egg
- 3-3.5 cups of flour (add gradually)

For rolling out the dough:

- Wheat starch (corn starch can also be used)

For the filling:

- 200g of walnuts or hazelnuts

For the topping:

- 100g of butter
- ⁠1/4 cup of vegetable oil

For the syrup:

- 3 cups of sugar
- 3 cups of water
- 1 slice of lemon

Instructions:

1. For the syrup, put the sugar, water, and lemon slice in a pot and mix. Let it boil over medium heat. Once it starts boiling, let it boil for 15 minutes, then let it cool.

2. For the dough, mix all the ingredients until you have a soft dough that doesn't stick to your hands. Divide the dough into 10 pieces and roll them out with wheat starch to the size of a smal plate. Arrange them on a suitable tray, cover them, and let them rest for 30 minutes.

3. Roll out the rested dough with wheat starch to a thin and large size. Sprinkle with a little butter and divide into 4 pieces, then shape them and place them on the tray.

4. Mix melted butter with clarified butter and vegetable oil, then drizzle over the pastries. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees Celsius for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown. Pour cold syrup over the hot pastries.

This 3 INGREDIENT ICICLE CANDY is a Winter Wonderland in Your Mouth!
description:
This 3 INGREDIENT ICICLE CANDY is a Winter Wonderland in Your Mouth!

✨Recipe:
1 cup sugar
½ cup light corn syrup
Blue food dye
Peppermint extract

Directions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine sugar and corn syrup and cover in cling wrap.
2. Microwave for 3 minutes, stir the contents, then cover and microwave for 2 more minutes.
3. Stir in food coloring and about 4 drops of peppermint extract, then pour onto a parchment paper lined baking sheet.
4. Spread out with a spatula until about ¼ inches thick. Let cool slightly, then with an oiled pizza cutter or knife, score the candy into about ½ to 1 inch strips.
5. Peel candy from parchment paper and carefully twist. Place back on the baking sheet and let cool overnight.
6. Serve and enjoy! 😉

description:
Established in 2016, Paradise Place is the premier spot for authentic Jamaican cuisine nestled in the heart of Las Vegas. From the moment you arrive, you are welcomed into a warm and vibrant atmosphere that offers an immersive cultural experience. The restaurant boasts a carefully curated selection of art and cultural displays, accentuated by the gentle rhythms of reggae music that play in the background. This creates an ambiance that makes you feel as though you’ve been transported right to the shores of Jamaica.

ONLYFANS 🔒 https://onlyfans.com/?ref=1118007 

YELP: https://www.yelp.com/biz/paradise-place-jamaican-cuisine-las-vegas

Address: 6985 W Sahara Ave, Suite 119, Las Vegas, NV 89117  
Contact: (702) 832-0925  
Email: paradiseplace876@gmail.com  

On my recent visit, I ventured into Paradise Place for the first time and was captivated by the delightful aroma of myriad spices before I even entered. The convenience of ample parking made starting this culinary journey stress-free.

I started my feast with their renowned oxtails a dish so tender that the meat practically melted in my mouth. This was accompanied by rice and peas, a staple in Jamaican cuisine, with perfectly balanced flavors. The side of cabbage mingled with carrots and broccoli added a fresh crunch that complemented the rich, hearty dishes.

As I continued, the curry chicken was a revelation. This dish is rooted deeply in Jamaica’s history, brought over by Indian laborers in the late 19th century. Over time, Jamaicans infused these curry dishes with local spices, creating a uniquely Caribbean twist that you can taste at Paradise Place. The chicken was flawlessly cooked, with each bite releasing a burst of aromatic spices.

The jerk chicken truly stole the show. Jerk cooking is a historical method developed by the Maroons, descendants of enslaved Africans who escaped into the Jamaican mountains. This technique involves marinating meat with a fiery blend of pimento, scotch bonnet peppers, and a mix of allspice. At Paradise Place, the smoky flavor from the grill and the boldness of the jerk sauce make this dish a standout, irresistible and full of cultural history.

To accompany these savory delights, I sampled two types of patties one beef and one vegetable. Both were encased in flaky pastry, with fillings that oozed warmth and spices with every bite. A sip of their freshly made pineapple ginger juice offered a refreshing counterbalance with its sweet and zesty notes.

No Jamaican dining experience would be complete without the famous Jamaican rum punch. This cocktail is a traditional party favorite across the island, typically featuring a delightful mix of rum, fresh juices, and a hint of nutmeg. At Paradise Place, the rum punch was crafted to perfection a smooth blend that was both invigorating and comforting.

Overall, my visit to Paradise Place was an unforgettable experience, offering a deep dive into the flavors and culture of Jamaica. The food was more than just delicious; it was a journey through Jamaican history and tradition, all served with a smile. If you’re in Las Vegas and craving a true taste of Jamaica, Paradise Place should be at the top of your list.

description:
This is day 10 of me trying to find out that which state of India has the best food. In this video I’ll be trying out the most famous food items of the northeastern “brother” state, Sikkim. Sikkim became a state of India in 1975, before which it was a sovereign state. Sikkim has a rich culture and heritage which is highly influenced by the Tibetan culture. Other than it being India’s only plastic free state and the world’s only organic state, Sikkim is also very well known for the delicious food that can be found at the corner of every street in this state. The most famous food items of Sikkim include but are not limited to: Momos, thukpa, sel roti, etc. Surprisingly all these food items were extremely flavourful and unique in their own way. I had a great time trying out these food items. Hope you guys enjoy the video !

I always forget which characters use which local specialties, so I went through each region’s specialty to find out:

Moving on to Liyue, there are NINE local specialties:
Jueyun Chili is used by Xiangling and Yaoyao
Noctilucuous Jade is used by Beidou and Yanfei
Silk Flower: Hu Tao and Xingqiu
Glaze Lily: Ningguang and Yunjin
Qingxin: Ganyu, Shenhe and Xiao 
Starconch: Ga Ming, Childe and Yelan
Violetgrass: Baizhu, Qiqi and Xinyan
Cor Lapis: Chongyun, Keqing and Zhongli
AND Clearwater Jade: Xianyun

This means Liyue has ONE local specialty used by ONE character, FOUR local specialties used by TWO characters and FOUR local specialties used by THREE characters

title: Must try food at Tirupati | Bunty days #tirupati #tirumala
description:
🙏 Must-Try Food at Tirumala After Darshan!
As soon as you complete your darshan at Tirumala, don’t miss this divine meal experience! 🍛✨

🍚 At the Annaprasadam stalls, you’ll get hot Sambar Rice – simple, soul-satisfying & served with so much love! Each devotee is offered 2 generous cups. 🙌

👣 The line moves fast, and food is served hot-hot 🔥 – no matter how big the crowd is, the seva continues non-stop!

🍽️ Next stop – Matrusri Vengamamba Annaprasadam Complex
Daily: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner for over 1 Lakh devotees 🙏

🌿 For lunch, you get Pongal on banana leaf 🍃, a tasty curry, chutney, a crunchy vada & then white rice with Sambar, Rasam, and Buttermilk – served hot & fresh!

📺 I’ll share the timings on screen, so don’t miss that!

😅 Outside food stalls I tried were okay-okay, but nothing beats Devudi Bhojanam 😍
Eating here is a real blessing 💫

💬 How many of you have had food here? Type YES in the comments!
📲 Follow for more such food + spiritual content!
🎥 See you in the next video!

✨Recipe: 
Fruit of Choice
Iced Flavored Milk

Directions:
1. Skewer your fruit and freeze for 24 hours.
2. Dip fruit in your iced flavored milk and turn to cover for 20 seconds. Place back in freezer for 1 hour.
3. If desired, dip a skewered fruit a second time and freeze for another hour.
4. Remove from freezer, serve immediately and enjoy!! 😊

description:
Trying Celebrity Chef Signature Dishes: Joël Robuchon “Pommes Puree” 🥔

It tastes like butter-flavored whipped cream, in the best way.

Ingredients
- 1lb high quality butter
- 2lb yellow potatoes (roughly same size)
- Whole Milk
- Salt

Steps
- rinse/scrub potatoes to remove dirt
- add unpeeled potatoes to a pot and cover with cold water (for each liter of water, add 10g salt)
- simmer uncovered until a knife can easily pierce (20-30 mins) then immediately drain
- while potatoes cool down a bit, bring a cup of milk to boil in a saucepan then set aside
- peel the potatoes and pass them through a sieve/ricer/food mill into a large pot
- place potato pot over low heat and stir potatoes until dry (4-5 min)
- add butter little by little, while stirring, to emulsify
- slowly add the milk in a thin stream, while stirring, until you are happy with the consistency (you may not have to use all the milk)
- stir purée with a whisk to make it fluffy
- pass the purée through a sieve again
- salt to taste and enjoy!
